column1: Program,The specific split or routine being followed (e.g. Full Body or Upper/Lower).
Phase,The training block or specific weeks of the program (e.g. Weeks 1-4).
Day,The specific workout session within the training phase.
Exercise,The specific movement to be performed.
Sets,A group of consecutive repetitions performed without rest.
Reps,"Short for repetitions, the number of times you perform the movement in a single set."
RPE,"Rate of Perceived Exertion. A scale from 1-10 used to measure the intensity of a set. For
Rest,The recommended amount of time to rest between sets before performing the next set.
Notes,Specific form cues or instructions to keep in mind while performing the exercise.
